raw_consumer_statement:
To Whom It May Concern, I am filing a complaint against Citi Bank regarding an unauthorized charge on my Best Buy credit card. 

On XX/XX/year>, a purchase was made using my Best Buy credit card through a " customer lookup '' process at a Best Buy store. I did not authorize this transaction and only became aware of it when I reviewed my billing statement. Upon reviewing the digital receipt, I confirmed that the purchase was made using customer lookupmeaning no physical card was presented. 

This is not the first time I have experienced this issue. I previously filed a dispute regarding a similar unauthorized transaction, and despite raising concerns, Citi Bank has continued to allow these types of charges and has held me responsible for them. 

I have already contacted Citi Bank to dispute this charge. However, they have continued to charge me for the transaction. I have proof that the purchase was made using the customer lookup feature, and I am prepared to provide supporting documentation to verify this. 


Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
